args.value:
Overlay cursor sequence A

The first visual cursor move should start from the fresh session origin.
The next move should continue from the idle cursor position instead of restarting at (0,0).

Overlay cursor sequence B

This set_value should move back from the toolbar click resting point.
If the idle lifecycle is working, the cursor should not disappear and re-enter from the lower-left origin between calls.

Overlay cursor sequence C

Final state after set_value -> click -> set_value -> click -> set_value.
The cursor should remain idle at the final text target until the process exits or a turn-ended notification clears it.
